entries.name: Staraptor-Mega
entries.recentTopCutNote: Pokemon Zone Limitless M-B: 51 appearances; top Roost build 27 teams
entries.role: dominant Contrary attacker: Close Combat becomes a snowballing Defense/SpD boost while Brave Bird pressures redirection and Grass/Fighting cores

set.setNotes: Live M-B set from Pokemon Zone/Pikalytics: Staraptite with Close Combat + Brave Bird + Protect + Roost/Tailwind. Contrary turns Close Combat drops into Defense/SpD boosts.

strengths: Contrary turns Close Combat drops into defensive boosts, so passive pivoting lets it snowball
Fighting/Flying STAB pressures Kingambit, Incineroar, Sneasler, Grass supports and many Steel cores
Roost sets convert defensive boosts into endgame staying power
pre-Mega Intimidate gives immediate physical mitigation
counters: do not feed it repeated Close Combat turns; double-target early before Contrary boosts stack
Haze, Clear Smog, Encore/Taunt pressure, strong special Fairy/Psychic/Electric attacks and fast revenge killers are the cleanest answers
Ghosts dodge Close Combat but must respect Brave Bird/coverage
notes: Pokemon Zone reports 51 Mega Staraptor appearances in Reg M-B Limitless data and lists Contrary + Staraptite as the top build.
Pikalytics tournament page agrees on Staraptite and the core moves Close Combat / Protect / Brave Bird / Roost.
Treat as the format-defining M-B preview threat until the ladder stabilizes.
uncertain: usagePercent=52.9 is taken from Pokemon Zone live Mega Staraptor build share/appearance data, not an official in-game ladder percentage.
